steps.t: Shubârza has asked that you find the sword once wielded by her brother, Iregâr, who fell in battle nearby in an Ekhamâti assault.
You have reached the battle-ground about which Shubârza told you. There are many weapons scattered around. One of these must be the sword once wielded…
Return to Shubârza in Amalíbi's camp near Iridír with her brother's sword.
